name: agenticsorg
description: Agentics Foundation marketplace — Claude Code plugins for the Agentics community, MCP integrations, and agentics.org tooling.

plugins.name: agentics-org
plugins.description: MCP access to agentics.org — fetch pages, search content, list routes, read sections as resources.

plugins.name: agentics-tutorials
plugins.description: Step-by-step tutorials: getting started, building agents, MCP integration. Skill-based, no server.

plugins.name: agentics-onboarding
plugins.description: Guided onboarding for new members: signup → community → first project → first event.

plugins.name: agentics-glossary
plugins.description: Glossary of Agentics, MCP, and agentic AI terms with /glossary lookup.

plugins.name: agentics-events
plugins.description: MCP access to Agentics events via the Luma API. List, search, fetch event details.

plugins.name: agentics-blog
plugins.description: MCP access to the Agentics blog (RSS-first, sitemap fallback). List, search, summarize posts.

plugins.name: agentics-projects
plugins.description: MCP access to Agentics projects: agenticsorg GitHub org repos plus the agentics.org/partners page.
